_comment: Project-scoped MCP servers committed to the repo. Every contributor gets the same toolset on `claude` start (after one-time approval). Add personal/secret-bearing MCPs to ~/.claude.json under `mcpServers` — not here.

filesystem._purpose: Tree-walks, glob across the monorepo, and read access scoped to the workspace root. Useful when Claude needs to scan apps/* and packages/* in one pass without spawning a subagent.

git._purpose: Structured git inspection — log, diff, blame, branch state. Faster and safer than asking the agent to construct git CLI invocations. Read-only by default.

github._purpose: PR/issue ops for the deployment workflow defined in .github/workflows/ci-cd.yml. The /review-pr command and the code-reviewer subagent rely on it. Token must be in the contributor's environment; we do NOT commit it.

postgres-dev._purpose: Schema introspection against the dev Aurora DSQL cluster. The migration-writer subagent uses this to verify table shape before generating Vn__*.sql. POSTGRES_DEV_URL must be exported by the contributor (DSQL IAM token, expires every 15min — re-export with `aws dsql generate-db-connect-admin-auth-token` if queries 401). If the env var is unset the server fails fast and Claude falls back to reading apps/functions/src/libs/db/schema/*.ts.
